title: The While Loop ⏳
description: Keep repeating until a specific condition tells you to stop.

slides.title: The Unknown ❓
slides.content:
# I don't know how long this will take!

Sometimes you DON'T know exactly how many times a loop needs to run.

Imagine a game screen: "Keep showing the enemies UNTIL the player's health hits 0."
You don't know if that will take 5 seconds or 5 hours.

For this, we use the `while` loop.

slides.title: Just like an If 🚦

quizData.question: What is the main difference between a 'for' loop and a 'while' loop?

options.text: 'for' loops handle known numbers of repeats, 'while' loops check general conditions.

quizData.explanation: While loops are used when the stopping condition is event-driven rather than a fixed number count.

slides.title: Danger: Infinite Loops 💥

quizData.question:
If your 'while' condition never evaluates to false, what type of bug do you create?
An _____ loop.
quizData.explanation: Infinite loops happen when the stopping condition can never be met.

slides.title: See it in Action
slides.content: Let's use a while loop to drain a battery.
